testcase.name: TC14 - Office Space listings are shown and Contact Agent button is clickable
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the MagicBricks Mumbai residential page................passed When the user clicks the Buy heading........................................passed And the user clicks "Office Space in Mumbai"................................passed And the user switches to the new tab........................................passed And the user clicks on the first office property............................passed And the user switches to the office detail tab..............................passed And the user clicks Contact Agent...........................................passed Then the Contact Agent action should be completed...........................passed
